spec.expr:
label_join(
  min(
    time() - container_start_time_seconds{
        namespace=~"$namespace",
        pod=~"$component.*",
        pod=~"$pod",
        container=~"$container",
        image!~"registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
        id=~".*.scope",
        pod!~"",
        container!~"" 
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace, node),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}/kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)

label_join(
  (
    (
      sum(kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
      -
      sum(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
    )
    /
    sum(
      deriv(kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace=~"$namespace", persistentvolumeclaim=~".*$component.*", persistentvolumeclaim=~"$pvc"}[$__rate_interval])
    ) by (persistentvolumeclaim, node)
  ) > 0,
  "nodepersistentvolumeclaim",
  ":",
  "node", "persistentvolumeclaim"
)

rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{
    namespace=~"$namespace",
    pod=~"$component.*",
    pod=~"$pod",
    container=~"$container",
    image!="registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
    id=~".*.scope",
    pod!="",
    container!=""
  }[$__rate_interval])
/
rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{
    namespace=~"$namespace",
    pod=~"$component.*",
    pod=~"$pod",
    container=~"$container",
    image!="registry.k8s.io/pause:3.10", 
    id=~".*.scope",
    pod!="",
    container!=""
  }[$__rate_interval])

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"2.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"3.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"4.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"5.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"2.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (route, status, method) > 0

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"3.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (route, status, method) > 0

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"4.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (route, status, method) > 0

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"5.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (route, status, method) > 0

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (route, status, method) > 0

label_join(
    label_join(
        sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (route, status, method) > 0,
    "statusroute", ":", "status", "route"
    ),
  "statusroutemethod", ":", "statusroute", "method"
)

label_join(
    label_join(
        avg(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0,
    "statusroute", ":", "status", "route"
    ),
  "statusroutemethod", ":", "statusroute", "method"
)

label_join(
    label_join(
        sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (status, method, route)
        /
        sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) > 0,
        "statusroute", ":", "status", "route"
    ),
    "statusroutemethod", ":", "statusroute", "method"
)

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"2.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))
/
sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"3.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))
/
sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"4.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))
/
sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"5.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))
/
sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))
/
sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum(increase(nginx_http_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod) > 0
max(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics", status=~"2.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
max(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics", status=~"3.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
max(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics", status=~"4.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
max(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics", status=~"5.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
max(nginx_http_request_duration_seconds{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_request_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"2.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_request_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"3.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_request_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"4.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_request_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"5.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_request_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_response_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"2.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_response_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"3.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_response_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"4.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_response_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"5.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0
avg(nginx_http_response_size_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"$pod", route=~"$route", route!~"/metrics|/actuator/health-check|", status=~"1.*", status=~"$status"}) by (route, status, method) > 0

label_join(
  sum(
    kube_pod_container_resource_limits{
        resource="cpu",
        namespace=~"$namespace",
        pod=~"$component.*",
        pod=~"$pod",
        container=~"$container",
        pod!~"",
        container!~""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace, node),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

label_join(
  sum(
    kube_pod_container_resource_requests{
        resource="cpu",
        namespace=~"$namespace",
        pod=~"$component.*",
        pod=~"$pod",
        container=~"$container",
        pod!~"",
        container!~""
    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace, node),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"
)

      pod!="",

    }
  ) by (pod, container, namespace, node),
  "podcontainer",
  ":",
  "pod",
  "container"

      pod!="",

    }

  "podcontainer",

label_join(

    kube_pod_container_resource_requests{
      resource="memory",
      namespace=~"$namespace",
      pod=~"$component.*",
      pod=~"$pod",
      container=~"$container",
      pod!="",

spec.definition: query_result(count by (owner_name) ( kube_pod_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind=~"StatefulSet|DaemonSet" } ) or count by (owner_name) ( kube_replicaset_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind="Deployment" } ))
spec.label: Component
spec.name: component

spec.query: query_result(count by (owner_name) ( kube_pod_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind=~"StatefulSet|DaemonSet" } ) or count by (owner_name) ( kube_replicaset_owner{ namespace=~"$namespace", owner_kind="Deployment" } ))
